text:
NCH 

VALUES: Y = Yes, beneficiary is a Managed care enrollee (hospital expects to receive payment from an MCO) 
N = No, beneficiary is not a MCO enrollee 

COMMENT: If any claim that comprises the Stay has a condition code (CLM_RLT_COND_CD) equal to '04' populate 
the MEDPAR Informational Encounter Switch with a 'Y'. If no '04' condition code, populate field with an 
'N'. This field is new in 2011. 
 ^ Back to TOC ^
